raw_model_answer:
STEP 1: Remove contaminated clothing and shoes immediately.
STEP 2: Wash skin thoroughly with plenty of soap and water for 15-20 minutes.
STEP 3: Rinse eyes with water if any splash occurred.

DO NOT: Use harsh scrubbing brushes or solvents.

ESCALATE: Seek medical attention if irritation persists or if systemic symptoms (nausea, dizziness) occur. Bring the product label/SDS.

immediate_steps: Remove contaminated clothing and shoes immediately.
Wash skin thoroughly with plenty of soap and water for 15-20 minutes.
Rinse eyes with water if any splash occurred.
do_not_do: Use harsh scrubbing brushes or solvents.
escalate_when: Seek medical attention if irritation persists or if systemic symptoms (nausea, dizziness) occur. Bring the product label/SDS.
